description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 1. Temporal reasoning overhaul**.

Goal: introduce a lightweight temporal-anchor representation so observations can preserve both the original relative phrase and a durable normalized anchor.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`

Worker notes:
- keep the stored/injected output human-readable and date-grouped
- the metadata should be small and durable; avoid building a heavyweight scheduler/calendar model
- anchor fields should support exact dates and coarse ranges/approximation

Useful context from the backlog doc: examples like `tomorrow (target: YYYY-MM-DD)` and `last week (week of YYYY-MM-DD)` are the intended sweet spot.
title: Add TemporalAnchor metadata and durable rendering for OM observations
